'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 112''' is the one hundred twelfth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 18]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The rise of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Slavery/Legends|Slaves]]
*[[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]]
*[[Robot ramship]]
*[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsabers]]
*[[Coral Vanda]]
